title: Array Index Out of Bounds Bug Fix for Missing Max

statement.markdown: Given an array of integers, return the maximum possible sum of a subarray of size 3. If no such subarray exists, return 0. For example, given the array [5, 2, 1, 3] the maximum possible sum of a subarray of size 3 is 6 which is 2,3,1. Given array [1, 2, 3, 4] the maximum possible sum of subarray of size 3 is 7 which is 2,3,4.
statement.inputFormat: n (space separated) followed by n elements of array
statement.outputFormat: Maximum possible sum of subarray with 3 numbers
statement.notes: Note: There may be subarrays with only 3 elements.

examples.explanation: Sum of 2,3,1 is 6 which is maximum possible sum of such subarray
Sum of 2,3,4 is 9 which is the maximum possible sum of such subarray

hints.text: Think about how to find the maximum sum of a subarray of size 3.

functionSignature.python: def maxSumOf3Subarray(self, n: int, nums: list[int]) -> int:
